title: Simple Night Vision
description: 🔦 Give all players permanent night vision as an alternative to fullbright texture packs
body:
Very simple (one minecraft command) permanent Night Vision datapack

Gives everyone on the server permanent Night Vision, useful when not everyone can install a fullbright mod or resource pack

![The Night Vision banner from Minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f36cab88e53a0f02265d61a40d2168a377421d9.png)
